rules.intent: Ensure benefit claims match MLR-approved wording.
rules.rule_text: Product benefits copy must follow the approved framework verbatim: "LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" with the approved bullets: Increase your muscle strength / Improve your skin symptoms / Rely less on steroids / Do more of the activities you love.

effect.content: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease. | ...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

rules.intent: Keep MOA messaging within MLR-approved claims.
